tool.system_prompt: Create/extract/list ZIP files (with Zip Slip/Zip Bomb protections). Important: during extract, Zip Slip paths (../, absolute paths, drive letters, etc.) are rejected. Important: overwrite=True for extract may overwrite existing files and will ask for confirmation via human_ask. Important: Zip bomb protections reject archives exceeding max_files and max_total_uncompressed_bytes. Important: paths outside workdir are rejected (per safe_file_ops_extras).parameterstypeobjectpropertiesactiontypestringenumcreateextractlistdescriptionparam.action.descriptionOperation type.zip_pathtypestringdescriptionparam.zip_path.descriptionPath to the zip file.sourcestypearrayitemstypestringdefaultdescriptionparam.sources.descriptionInputs for create (files/directories).dest_dirtypestringdefault.descriptionparam.dest_dir.descriptionDestination directory for extract.exclude_globstypearrayitemstypestringdefaultdescriptionparam.exclude_globs.descriptionExclusions for create (simple: basename match).overwritetypebooleandefaultdescriptionparam.overwrite.descriptionWhether to overwrite existing files on extract (requires confirmation).max_filestypeintegerdefaultdescriptionparam.max_files.descriptionMaximum number of files allowed on extract (zip bomb protection).max_total_uncompressed_bytestypeintegerdefaultdescriptionparam.max_total_uncompressed_bytes.descriptionMaximum total uncompressed bytes allowed on extract (zip bomb protection).dry_runtypebooleandefaultdescriptionparam.dry_run.descriptionFor extract: validate only without extracting.requiredactionzip_path\\///..://messageuser_replyyyes [y/c/N]: yactionzip_pathsourcesdest_dir.exclude_globsoverwrite
